title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Independent Algorithm Trial
summary: Coordinate undo history, request scheduling, and sliding-window alerts. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a suite of bounded linear abstract data types with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stack, queue, and deque behavior independently from implementation details.
Apply LIFO state to parsing, undo, traversal, and nested-delimiter validation.
Apply FIFO ordering with bounded capacity and explicit overload behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
